# st-voice — Browse, download, and test Piper TTS voice models

Lists available TTS voices and sets the active voice used by `st-speak`. The selected voice is saved to `TTS_VOICE` in your config.

**Related:** [st-speak](st-speak) · [st-admin](st-admin) · [TTS Audio](tts-audio)

---

## For developers

Voices are discovered from the local Piper TTS server. Run `st-admin` to set `TTS_HOST` and `TTS_PORT` if the server is not on localhost:5000.
